headline: This Gold Stock Under $30 Is The Pivot Away From Historically Overvalued Tech
summary: NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) is the ticker dominating every cable news segment, every podcast, and every brokerage push notification right now, riding the AI capital spending cycle to fresh records. The NASDAQ 100 has run 16.8% year to date and 39.6% over the past year, almost entirely on the back of a handful of AI infrastructure names. ... headline: Newmont Corp (NYSE:NEM) Passes the Peter Lynch GARP Test With Flying Colors
summary: Discover how Newmont Corp (NEM) fits Peter Lynch's GARP strategy with a 0.61 PEG ratio, strong profitability, and low debt for long-term value.

headline: Summit Royalties Announces Closing of 1.0% NSR Royalty Acquisition on Newmont's Saddle North Deposit
summary: TORONTO, June 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Summit Royalties Ltd. (TSXV: SUM, OTCQB: SUMMF) (the "Corporation" or "Summit") is pleased to announce, further to its news release dated March 12, 2026 and entitled "Summit Royalties Announces Agreement to Acquire Royalty on Newmont's Saddle North Deposit", that it has completed the acquisition (the "Acquisition") of an existing 1.0% net smelter return royalty (the "NSR royalty") on the Saddle North Deposit owned by Newmont Corporation for C$5 million

raw.headline: Summit Royalties Announces Closing of 1.0% NSR Royalty Acquisition on Newmont's Saddle North Deposit

headline: Thesis Gold & Silver Strengthens Team with Appointment of Dimitry Demianyuk as EVP Project Development
summary: Thesis Gold & Silver Inc. ("Thesis", or the "Company") (TSXV: TAU) (OTCQX: THSGF) (WKN: A3EP87) is pleased to announce the appointment of Mr. Dimitry Demianyuk as Executive Vice President, Project Development, effective June 21, 2026.
